blocks.heading: Section heading
blocks.body: Write your paragraph here. Use this space to explain a concept clearly and concisely.

library.title: MSP Onboarding
library.description: Finish Setup first, then choose your own track — RMM, PSA, or both.
library.author: Atera Training

library.title: Setup essentials
library.description: Create your workspace, deploy the first agent, and get Atera ready for day one.
library.author: Atera Training

blocks.heading: Welcome to Atera
blocks.body: Set your company profile, invite technicians, and connect your email — the three steps every new account starts with.

steps.title: Download
steps.body: Grab the agent installer for your OS.

steps.title: Install
steps.body: Run it on the first device.

steps.title: Verify
steps.body: See the device appear under Monitored assets.

blocks.question: Where does a new device appear after the agent is installed?
blocks.feedbackCorrect: Correct — Monitored assets is your device inventory.
blocks.feedbackWrong: Not quite — check the Monitored assets page.

library.title: RMM fundamentals
library.description: Monitoring, alerts, patching, and remote access — the core of device management.
library.author: Atera Training

blocks.heading: Know before your customer does
blocks.body: Thresholds watch CPU, disk, and services on every monitored asset and raise alerts the moment something drifts.

blocks.heading: Stay fully patched
blocks.body: Patch automation profiles install OS and software updates on a schedule you control.

blocks.statement: Patch automation can run on a schedule per device group.
blocks.feedbackWrong: It can — profiles apply per folder or group.

library.title: PSA fundamentals
library.description: Tickets, billing, and customer management for your service desk.
library.author: Atera Training

steps.title: New
steps.body: A ticket arrives from email or the portal.

steps.title: Assigned
steps.body: A technician (or Autopilot) picks it up.

steps.title: Resolved
steps.body: Work is logged and the customer notified.

blocks.heading: Bill for every hour
blocks.body: Contracts define rates; time entries roll into invoices automatically.

blocks.question: What turns logged time into an invoice?
blocks.feedbackWrong: Contracts define how time is billed.

library.title: Autopilot Fundamentals
library.description: Learn how Atera Autopilot resolves tickets end-to-end — from trigger to resolution.
library.author: Atera Training

blocks.text: Autopilot is Atera’s AI teammate — it reads, reasons, and resolves IT tickets without waiting on a human.

blocks.heading: What you will learn
blocks.body: By the end of this lesson you will understand what Autopilot does, where it fits in the ticket lifecycle, and how it keeps a human in control at every step.

blocks.title: AI, not autopilot-only
blocks.body: Every automated resolution respects the guardrails and approval rules you define. You stay in control.

steps.title: Trigger
steps.body: A ticket arrives from email, portal, or an alert.

steps.title: Understand
steps.body: Autopilot reads the ticket and pulls device + customer context.

steps.title: Act
steps.body: It runs the right script or drafts a reply.

steps.title: Resolve
steps.body: The ticket is closed or escalated with a full audit trail.

items.title: What data does it use?
items.body: Device inventory, past tickets, and your knowledge base.

items.title: Can it run scripts?
items.body: Yes — only scripts you have approved for automation.

blocks.heading: Staying in control
blocks.body: Guardrails let you decide exactly what Autopilot may do on its own and what needs a technician to approve.

blocks.question: What happens when a ticket falls outside Autopilot’s guardrails?

options.text: It is escalated to a technician

blocks.feedback: Correct — Autopilot always escalates rather than guessing.

library.title: Reading the AI Center
library.description: A quick tour of the metrics that matter.
library.author: Atera Training

blocks.heading: Your AI at a glance
blocks.body: The AI Center Overview is the single place to see what Autopilot and Copilot are doing for you.
